message:
feat(python): numpy.nansum wrapper parity (franken_numpy-54nq)

Adds a passthrough wrapper for numpy.nansum covering axis, explicit
dtype, `out=` destination, and keepdims. Test covers 1-D with NaN
(treated as 0), fully-NaN slice returning 0 (distinct from nanmean
NaN behavior), 2-D axis=0/1, integer input matching plain sum,
dtype=float32 promotion with dtype parity, and keepdims shape parity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
